title: Online Booking
enableBookingDesc: Allow customers to request services directly from your public booking page.
headline: Page Headline
selectTradesDesc: Choose which services customers can request. Leave unchecked to show all.
apiKeyDesc: Use this key to send leads from your existing website forms.
regenerateConfirm: Regenerate API key? Existing integrations will stop working.
embedCodeDesc: Paste this on your website to embed the booking form.
apiDocsDesc: POST to /api/public/book with x-api-key header. Body: { name, phone, description, email?, address?, trade?, preferred_date? }
